alertlist_create_alerts_tooltip: More details on how to create alerts
alertlist_empty_get_started: Create an Alert Rule to get started
alertlist_empty_subtitle: Create and manage alert rules for your resources.
alertlist_no_match_subtitle: No alert rules match your search. Try adjusting your search criteria.
alertlist_sample_alerts_divider: Or get started with these sample alerts
alertlist_search_placeholder: Search by Alert Name, Severity and Labels
alertlist_watch_tutorial: Watch a tutorial on creating a sample alert
infra_empty_before_retention_message: Your requested end time is earlier than the earliest detected time of K8s metrics data, please adjust your end time.
infra_empty_before_retention_title: Queried time range is before earliest K8s metrics
infra_empty_edit_query_retry: Edit your query and try again!
infra_empty_error_default: An error occurred while fetching data.
infra_empty_error_support_hint: Our team is getting on top to resolve this. Please reach out to support if the issue persists.
infra_empty_no_data_message: When we receive data, it will show up here.
infra_empty_no_host_metrics_message_suff: to learn how to send host metrics.
infra_empty_no_host_metrics_title: No host metrics data received yet
infra_empty_no_results: This query had no results. Edit your query and try again!
infra_empty_upgrade_k8s_chart: To see K8s metrics, upgrade to the latest version of SigNoz k8s-infra chart. Please contact support if you need help.
infra_error_aw_snap_message: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
infra_events_not_configured_message: To view events, enable the k8s events receiver in your OpenTelemetry Collector.
logs_live_tail_stopped_error: Live tail stopped due to some error.
mbr_link_invite_desc: Share this one-time link with the team member to complete their account setup.
mbr_link_reset_desc: This creates a one-time link the team member can use to set a new password for their Keeper account.
mbr_no_smtp_hint: No email server is configured, so share this link manually with the invited person.
mbr_reset_link_copied: Password reset link copied to clipboard
mbr_root_tooltip: This operation is not supported for the root user
mbr_self_tooltip: You cannot perform this action on your own account
mbr_subtitle: Overview of people added to this workspace.
mbr_val_emails: Please enter valid emails for team members
mbr_val_emails_roles: Please enter valid emails and select roles for team members
mbr_val_roles: Please select roles for team members
meter_banner_beta: Meter module data is accurate only from 22nd August 2025, 00:00 UTC onwards. Data before this time was collected during the beta phase and may be inaccurate.
meter_banner_billing: Billing is calculated in UTC. To match your meter data with billing, select full-day ranges in UTC time (00:00 – 23:59 UTC). For example, if you're in PT, for the billing of Jan 1, select your time range as Dec 31, 4:00 PM – Jan 1, 3:59 PM PT.
meter_banner_short_range: Meter metrics data is aggregated over 1 hour period. Please select time range accordingly.
meter_panel_total_log_size: Total size of log records ingested
metrics_active_time_series_tooltip: Active time series are those that have received data points in the last 1 hour.
metrics_all_attributes_tooltip: Showing attributes for the selected time range
metrics_attributes_fetch_error: Something went wrong while fetching attributes
metrics_empty_select_metric: Select a metric and run a query to see the results
metrics_highlights_fetch_error: Something went wrong while fetching metric highlights
metrics_inspect_cancelled_subtext: Click "Run Query" to see inspect results.
metrics_inspect_empty: No time series found for this metric to inspect.
metrics_inspector_completed: 🎉 Ta-da! You have completed your metric query tutorial.
metrics_inspector_completed_hint: You can inspect a new metric or reset the query builder.
metrics_inspector_step_temporal_prefix: First, align the data by selecting a
metrics_inspector_welcome: 👋 Hello, welcome to the Metrics Inspector
metrics_list_view_tooltip: The table displays all metrics in the selected time range. Each row represents a unique metric, and its metric name, and metadata like description, type, unit, and samples/timeseries cardinality observed in the selected time range.
metrics_metadata_fetch_error: Something went wrong while fetching metric metadata
metrics_metadata_update_error: Failed to update metadata, please try again. If the issue persists, please contact support.
metrics_no_unit_warning: No unit is set for this metric. You can assign one from the <link>metric details</link> page.
metrics_one_chart_per_query_different_un: One chart per query cannot be disabled for multiple queries with different units.
metrics_one_chart_per_query_single_metri: One chart per query cannot be toggled when there is only one metric.
metrics_one_chart_per_query_single_query: One chart per query cannot be toggled for a single query.
metrics_proportion_view_tooltip: The treemap displays the proportion of samples/timeseries in the selected time range. Each tile represents a unique metric, and its size indicates the percentage of samples/timeseries it contributes to the total.
metrics_search_placeholder: Search your metrics. Try service.name='api' to see all API service metrics, or http.client for HTTP client metrics.
metrics_set_unit_question: Set the selected unit as the metric unit?
metrics_table_empty_state: This query had no results. Edit your query and try again!
metrics_treemap_error: Error fetching metrics. If the problem persists, please contact support.
qf_edit_quick_filters_msg: You can now customize and re-arrange your quick filters panel. Select the quick filters you’d need and hide away the rest for faster exploration.
qf_query_placeholder: Enter your filter query (e.g., http.status_code >= 500 AND service.name = 'frontend')
qf_sync_tooltip: Filter currently in sync with query {{queryName}}
svc_entrypoint_spans_tooltip: Shows the spans where requests enter new services for the first time
svc_high_top_level_ops_desc: The service `{{service}}` has too many top level operations. It makes the dashboard slow to load.
svc_instrument_app_prefix: Please instrument your application as mentioned
svcmap_filter_tooltip: Currently, service map supports filtering of {{keys}} only, in resource attributes
svcmap_search_attrs: Search and Filter based on resource attributes.
trace_filter_placeholder: Enter your filter query (e.g., http.status_code >= 500 AND service.name = 'frontend')
trace_flame_graph_sampled_warning: The total span count exceeds the visualization limit. Displaying a sampled subset of spans in flamegraph.
funnel_search_ph: Search by name, description, or tags...
funnel_no_perm_edit: You need editor or admin access to edit funnels
funnel_no_perm_step: You need editor or admin access to add details to step
funnel_missing_names_desc: Fill in the service and span names for all the steps
funnel_no_traces: There are no traces that match the funnel steps.
funnel_no_traces_desc: Check the service / span names in the funnel steps and try again to start seeing analytics here
funnel_fetch_error: Error fetching data. If the problem persists, please contact support.
funnel_empty_subtitle: Create a funnel to start analyzing your data
qb_set_the_time_interval: Set the time interval for aggregation
qb_break_down_data_by: Break down data by attributes like service name, endpoint, status code, or region. Essential for spotting patterns and comparing performance across different segments.
qb_filter_grouped_results_based: Filter grouped results based on aggregate conditions. Show only groups meeting specific criteria, like error rates > 5% or p99 latency > 500
qb_sort_results_to_surface: Sort results to surface what matters most. Quickly identify slowest operations, most frequent errors, or highest resource consumers.
qb_apply_mathematical_operations_like: Apply mathematical operations like sum, average, min, max, or percentiles to reduce multiple time series into a single value.
qb_learn_to_write_faster: Learn to write faster, optimized queries
qb_install_the_signoz_clickhouse: Install the SigNoz ClickHouse query agent skill
qb_no_legends_available_run: No legends available. Run a query to see legend options.
qb_display_individual_data_points: Display individual data points on the chart
qb_fill_gaps_in_data: Fill gaps in data with 0 for continuity
qb_enter_a_description_for: Enter a description for the variable
qb_enable_multiple_values_to: Enable multiple values to be checked
qb_include_an_option_for: Include an option for ALL values
qb_select_panels_to_apply: Select Panels to apply this variable
qb_sync_crosshair_and_tooltip: Sync crosshair and tooltip across all the dashboard panels

cfg_no_external_api_calls: No External API calls detected with applied filters.

cfg_an_error_occured_while: An error occured while querying sample logs
